raw_text: A flaw has been found in D-Link DNS-120, DNR-202L, DNS-315L, DNS-320, DNS-320L, DNS-320LW, DNS-321, DNR-322L, DNS-323, DNS-325, DNS-326, DNS-327L, DNR-326, DNS-340L, DNS-343, DNS-345, DNS-726-4, DNS-1100-4, DNS-1200-05 and DNS-1550-04 up to 20260205. This affects an unknown function of the file /cgi-bin/wizard_mgr.cgi. Executing a manipulation can lead to command injection. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.
